<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.24.1-Tisler">
  <identifier>Protected Areas 2014</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>Protected Areas 2014</title>
  <abstract>REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.

REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links>
    <link mimeType="" type="Local Area Network" format="" description="" name="Shapefile" url="file://\\ENVIRONMENT\C$\Documents and Settings\User\Desktop\Data Manager - Antigua and Barbuda EIMAS\Lia new layers\ATG_final_5" size=""/>
  </links>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Access">REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.</constraints>
  <rights>REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["Antigua 1943 / British West Indies Grid",BASEGEOGCRS["Antigua 1943",DATUM["Antigua 1943",ELLIPSOID["Clarke 1880 (RGS)",6378249.145,293.465,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4601]],CONVERSION["British West Indies Grid",METHOD["Transverse Mercator",ID["EPSG",9807]],PARAMETER["Latitude of natural origin",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8801]],PARAMETER["Longitude of natural origin",-62,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8802]],PARAMETER["Scale factor at natural origin",0.9995,SCALEUNIT["unity",1],ID["EPSG",8805]],PARAMETER["False easting",400000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8806]],PARAMETER["False northing",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8807]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Engineering survey, topographic mapping."],AREA["Antigua island - onshore."],BBOX[16.94,-61.95,17.22,-61.61]],ID["EPSG",2001]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=tmerc +lat_0=0 +lon_0=-62 +k=0.9995 +x_0=400000 +y_0=0 +a=6378249.145 +rf=293.465 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>2</srsid>
      <srid>2001</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:2001</authid>
      <description>Antigua 1943 / British West Indies Grid</description>
      <projectionacronym>tmerc</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7012</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial minx="-61.91662900000000036" maxy="17.77737300000000076" maxz="0" crs="EPSG:2001" maxx="-61.64164000000000243" miny="16.99525300000000172" dimensions="2" minz="0"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
